revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Kofun]] to [[Category:Original templates]][[Category:Original templates]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: I do not know which of these is the proper one

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Festivals in Japan by prefecture]] to [[Template:Festivals of Japan by prefecture]]: Text replacement - "Festivals in " to "Festivals of "

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Festivals_in_Japan_by_prefecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
